---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement (accuracy, a model/backend, output format, integration)
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / use case**
<!-- What are you trying to do that scriba doesn't (do well) today? -->

**Proposed solution**
<!-- What would you like to see? A flag, a model, an output, a workflow? -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- Other approaches, or existing tools that do this. -->

**Footprint note**
<!-- scriba aims to run on a normal Mac. If this needs a heavy model/dep, say so. -->
